```{r}
#niezbędne pakiety
packages <- c(
  "vcd", 
  "OpenMx", 
  "bmem", 
  "ca", 
  "MASS", 
  "expm", 
  "svd", 
  "psych", 
  "ggplot2", 
  "ggrepel", 
  "readxl"
)

new_packages <- packages[!(packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"])]

if(length(new_packages)) install.packages(new_packages)



library(vcd)
library(OpenMx)
library(bmem)
library(ca)
library(MASS)
library(expm)
library(svd)
library(psych)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(readxl)


```
